title: tephrosia albissima
intro: Tephrosia albissima, also known as the white shrub or white horse bean, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia albissima include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Tephrosia albissima can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine formulations, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
